info.name: MetaVox
info.summary: SharePoint-style metadata columns for Nextcloud Team Folders
info.description:
MetaVox adds SharePoint-style metadata management to Nextcloud Team Folders. Define custom metadata fields and edit them inline — directly in the file list. Your files stay untouched: metadata is stored separately, never modifying file content.
**10+ field types:** text, number, date, checkbox, dropdown, multi-select, URL, user picker, file link, and more.
**Key Features:**
- **Inline grid editing** — Double-click any cell to edit. Changes appear instantly for all users. - **Views** — Save column, filter, and sort combinations as tabs. Switch views with one click. - **Real-time collaboration** — Cell locking prevents concurrent edits. Syncs via WebSocket (notify_push). - **Client-side filter and sort** — Instant filtering with zero server calls. - **AI metadata autofill** — AI reads file content and suggests metadata values. - **Bulk editing** — Edit metadata for multiple files at once. - **Backup and restore** — Automated daily backups with one-click restore. - **Flow integration** — Automate actions based on metadata values (notifications, access control, retention). - **REST API** — Full OCS API for external integrations and bulk operations.
**Ideal for:** SharePoint migrations, document classification, curriculum tagging, policy management, and research annotation. Used by universities, government organizations, and enterprises.
Supports **Nextcloud 31, 32, and 33** with automatic feature detection.
info.author: Sam Ditmeijer
Rik Dekker
